proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with each one-unit increase in feature_041 have higher mean pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: The univariable slope for feature_041 was 0.1765 months per unit. Univariable OLS effect=0.1765, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with each one-unit increase in feature_025 have lower mean pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: The univariable slope for feature_025 was -1.1897 months per unit. Univariable OLS effect=-1.1897, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with feature_043=1 rather than feature_043=0 have higher mean pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 5.089 for feature_043=1 versus 4.117 for feature_043=0. Univariable OLS effect=0.9722, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with feature_036=1 rather than feature_036=0 have lower mean pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 3.703 for feature_036=1 versus 5.055 for feature_036=0. Univariable OLS effect=-1.3520, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for the strongest screened features (feature_041, feature_025, feature_036, feature_043, feature_056, feature_050, feature_001, feature_015, feature_029, feature_066, feature_042, feature_039), each one-unit increase in feature_041 remains associated with higher pfs_months.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_041 + feature_025 + feature_036 + feature_043 + feature_056 + feature_050 + feature_001 + feature_015 + feature_029 + feature_066 + feature_042 + feature_039
analyses.result_summary: In a multivariable OLS model with the 12 strongest univariable features, adjusted coefficient for feature_041 was 0.1758 months, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint association of feature_001 and feature_043 with pfs_months is less than additive; the feature_001 by feature_043 interaction coefficient is negative.

analyses.result_summary: OLS with main effects and an interaction gave a feature_001:feature_043 coefficient of -1.6288 months, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between feature_001 and pfs_months is more negative among patients with feature_043=1 than among patients with feature_043=0.

analyses.code: Stratified OLS by feature_043; confirm with OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_001 + feature_043 + feature_001:feature_043
analyses.result_summary: Stratified slopes for feature_001 were -1.6301 months in feature_043=1 and -0.0013 months in feature_043=0; interaction-model difference=-1.6288, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between feature_015 and pfs_months is more negative among patients with feature_043=1 than among patients with feature_043=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between feature_041 and pfs_months is more negative in the highest quartile of feature_025 than in the lowest quartile of feature_025.

analyses.code: Quartile stratification plus OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_041 + feature_025 + feature_041:feature_025
analyses.result_summary: Lowest-quartile feature_025 slope for feature_041 was 0.1800; highest-quartile slope was 0.1741. Continuous interaction coefficient=-0.0072, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients in the highest quartile of feature_041 (>= 71.800) have higher mean pfs_months than patients below that quartile.

analyses.result_summary: Highest-quartile feature_041 mean pfs_months was 6.571 versus 3.550 below the quartile; effect=3.0212, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients in the highest quartile of feature_025 (>= 1.000) have lower mean pfs_months than patients below that quartile.

analyses.result_summary: Highest-quartile feature_025 mean pfs_months was 3.791 versus 5.271 below the quartile; effect=-1.4806, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients in the highest quartile of feature_056 (>= 6.400) have lower mean pfs_months than patients below that quartile.

analyses.result_summary: Highest-quartile feature_056 mean pfs_months was 3.929 versus 4.440 below the quartile; effect=-0.5109, p=<1e-300.
